import asyncio

CACHE: dict[str, str] = {}
IN_FLIGHT: dict[str, asyncio.Task[str]] = {}


async def get_profile(user_id: str) -> str:
    cached = CACHE.get(user_id)
    if cached is not None:
        return cached
    task = IN_FLIGHT.get(user_id)
    if task is None:
        async def build() -> str:
            await asyncio.sleep(0.02)
            return f"profile:{user_id}"
        task = asyncio.create_task(build())
        IN_FLIGHT[user_id] = task
    value = await task
    CACHE[user_id] = value
    IN_FLIGHT.pop(user_id, None)
    return value
